download_file.title: Download to file
download_file.description_p1: Here you can download an overview of all powers of attorney that {{reportee}} has given to others and those who have received them.
download_file.description_p2:
The content will be downloaded as CSV files in a ZIP container. 
The files are not intended for machine reading and we reserve the right to change the format.
download_file.include_subunits_label: Include powers of attorney in {{reportee}}'s subunits
download_file.too_many_subunits_warning: This organization has too many subunits to include them in the download. We are working on a solution for this, but for now, you must download each subunit separately if you want their information.

info_banner.info: June 19: the old Altinn will be shut down.
info_banner.link: Here's what you need to be aware of.
info_banner.link_new: This is how you grant new powers of attorney and accesses.

sidebar.consent: Consent and power of attorney agreements

error_page.not_found_site_header: Oops! The page you're trying to find is unknown to us.
error_page.not_found_site_upper_text: We do not know where you really intended to go, but perhaps you can find what you are looking for on some of these pages:
error_page.not_found_site_lower_text: If this was not helpful you are free to contact Altinn support on telephone 75 00 60 00
error_page.find_and_submit_scheme: Find and submit a new form
error_page.not_found_site_description: Many come to Altinn to do one of these things:
error_page.see_messages: See messages or tasks in the inbox
error_page.start_or_run_business: Read about rights and obligations for entrepreneurs
error_page.unknown_error_header: Oops! An error seems to have occurred
error_page.if_persistent_contact_service: If the error persists, you can go to Altinn's help page or contact support at 75 00 60 00
error_page.no_user_connection: This user has no powers of attorney for {{reportee}}.
error_page.acting_party_data_error: A technical error occurred. Please try again later. If the problem persists, contact Altinn support at 75 00 60 00.
error_page.unsynced_connection_title: Synchronization issue - our fault, not yours
error_page.unsynced_connection: We have a synchronization issue between the new and old solution. This is something we are working on, but for now, you unfortunately cannot see your accesses here. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!
error_page.unsynced_connection_link: Click here to view your accesses in the old solution

reportee_change_error.description: The selected actor isn't available to you, or the link you followed was invalid.
reportee_change_error.if_persistent_contact_service: If the problem persists, please contact Altinn support at 75 00 60 00.
reportee_change_error.where_to_now: Where would you like to go now?

single_rights.current_services_title: Power of attorney for {{count}} single services
single_rights.delete_singleRight_success_message: Power of attorney over {{resourceTitle}} has been successfully revoked for {{name}}.
single_rights.delete_singleRight_error_message: Failed to revoke power of attorney over {{resourceTitle}}.
single_rights.add_singleRight_success_message: {{name}} has been successfully granted power of attorney over {{resourceTitle}}.
single_rights.helptext_content: Single services are powers of attorney granted to a single service. Services a user has access to through access packages or roles will not appear here.

action_popover.right_inherited: This action is inherited and cannot be changed here.
action_popover.right_not_delegable: You lack this action yourself and therefore cannot remove it from others.

access_packages.helptext_content: Access packages are a collection of forms and services that deal with the same topic. These will replace Altinn roles and will be filled with more services over time.
access_packages.current_access_packages_title: Power of attorney for {{count}} access packages
access_packages.other_packages_in_area_title: Other available packages in this area:

access_packages.package_delegation_error: Failed to grant power of attorney over {{accessPackage}} to {{name}}.
access_packages.package_deletion_success: Power of attorney over {{accessPackage}} has been successfully revoked for {{name}}.
access_packages.package_deletion_error: Failed to revoke {{name}}'s power of attorney over {{accessPackage}}.
access_packages.user_has_no_packages: This user has no access packages.
access_packages.info_alert_text: Access packages replace today's Altinn roles. Read more on the help pages.
access_packages.person_info_alert: Giving powers of attorney to individuals is currently not supported. This will come later.

delegation_check.delegation_check_error_message_singular: A technical error prevents you from giving the user the access package. Please contact Altinn user service if the problem persists.
delegation_check.delegation_check_error_message_plural: A technical error prevents you from giving the user one or more access packages. Please contact Altinn user service if the problem persists.

guardianships.modal_info_description: The appointment of a guardian is retrieved from the County Governor. It cannot be deleted or changed here.
guardianships.modal_info_info_1: A guardian can assist with paying bills, managing assets, or representing individuals before public authorities.
guardianships.modal_info_info_2: To see what this power of attorney covers, you can go to the guardianship tab in the overview.

role.fetch_error_heading: Unable to show roles for this user
role.fetch_error_description: We can't fetch the roles right now.
role.resources_disclaimer: This role might still grant access to services that only exist in the old solution.
role.resources_disclaimer_link: See the list of services in the old solution
role.delete_role_confirmation: Roles from the old Altinn solution have been discontinued, so you will NOT be able to grant power of attorney to this role again.
role.deleting_role_loading: Waiting for the role to be deleted...
role.delete_role_success: The power of attorney for this role has been deleted.
role.cannot_assign_role_poa: This role has been discontinued and can no longer be granted as a power of attorney. To grant access to services, please use access packages or single services.

access_status.via_role: {{user_name}} has access to this through the role they hold in {{via_name}}.
access_status.via_keyrole: {{user_name}} has access to this through their role in {{via_name}}.
access_status.via_priv: {{user_name}} has access to this through their role as a private individual.
access_status.via_er: {{user_name}} has access to this through their role in {{via_name}}. It cannot be deleted.

user_roles.has_client_access_description: This user has access to one or more of the organization's clients. This does not necessarily mean they have access to the organization's own content, but that they can perform work on behalf of one or more of their clients/customers. Which clients they have access to can be managed under client administration.
user_roles.has_client_access_description_self: You have access to one or more of the organization's clients. This does not necessarily mean you have access to the organization's own content, but you can perform work on behalf of one or more of their clients/customers. Which clients you have access to can be managed under your clients.

users_page.main_page_heading: Users with power of attorney in {{name}}
users_page.user_list_heading: Other users with power of attorney
users_page.only_you_have_access: Only you have power of attorney. Add a new user to grant power of attorney to others.
users_page.no_users: You have not received any power of attorney from others.
users_page.no_access_to_users_header: We are still working on this page!
users_page.no_access_to_users_message:
Only access managers can see the full list of users with powers of attorney in this organization.
A list of key personnel (the board) will eventually be made available to users without access management.

delete_user.user_heading: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
delete_user.user_message: {{to_name}} will lose all authorizations for {{from_name}} and will no longer have access to their content or be able to represent them in Altinn. This action cannot be undone.
delete_user.user_non_deletable_reasons_intro: {{to_name}} has authorizations that cannot be deleted here
delete_user.yourself_non_deletable_reasons_intro: You have authorizations that cannot be deleted here
delete_user.reportee_non_deletable_reasons_intro: {{to_name}} has authorizations for {{from_name}} that cannot be deleted here
delete_user.non_deletable_reason_er_roles: Authorizations that follow roles in the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities must be changed via <erLink>the Coordinated Register Notification</erLink>.
delete_user.non_deletable_reason_agent_role: Client accesses can be managed in <agentLink>{{linkText}}</agentLink>.
delete_user.non_deletable_reason_guardianship: Authorizations granted through guardianship from <guardianshipLink>the Norwegian Civil Affairs Authority</guardianshipLink>.
delete_user.user_partial_confirmation_message: The user also has other authorizations, and you can delete them here. Do you want to proceed? This action cannot be undone.
delete_user.yourself_heading: Are you sure you want to delete all your access?
delete_user.yourself_message: You will lose all authorizations you have for {{from_name}} and will no longer have access to their content or be able to represent them in Altinn. This action cannot be undone.
delete_user.yourself_limited_deletion_heading: You have access that cannot be deleted
delete_user.yourself_partial_confirmation_message: You also have other authorizations, and you can delete them here. Do you want to proceed? This action cannot be undone.
delete_user.reportee_heading: Are you sure you want to delete all their access?
delete_user.reportee_message: {{to_name}} will lose all authorizations for {{from_name}} and will no longer have access to their content or be able to represent them in Altinn. This action cannot be undone.
delete_user.reportee_limited_deletion_heading: They have access that cannot be deleted
delete_user.reportee_partial_confirmation_message: {{to_name}} also has other authorizations, and you can delete them here. Do you want to proceed? This action cannot be undone.

actions.action_description: These are the technical actions that the service offers. You can grant power of attorney to the entire service or choose specific actions.
actions.request_action_description: These are the technical actions that the service offers. You can only request power of attorney for the entire service.
actions.approve_action_description: These are the technical actions that the service offers. You can only approve power of attorney for the entire service.

instance_actions.access_to_all: Access to the entire message or form
instance_actions.action_description: The available technical actions are shown here. You can grant power of attorney to all actions or choose individual ones.

specific_rights.missing_role_message: You cannot delegate the entire service because you lack some of the rights yourself.
specific_rights.missing_srr_right_message: {{reportee}} is not given permission from {{resourceOwner}} to delegate the whole service. Contact them if you want to change this.

technical_error_message.heading: Oops! Something went wrong.
technical_error_message.message: We encountered a technical issue. If the problem continues, please contact Altinn user service.
technical_error_message.all_failed: No new rights were granted to {{name}}
technical_error_message.revoke_failed: A technical error occurred while trying to delete the service. Please try again or contact Altinn user service if the problem persists.

partial_deletion_message.heading: Do you want to delete the access not linked to the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities?
partial_deletion_message.body:
{{ to_name }} has been granted this authorization both directly and through their roles in the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities.

Even if you delete this directly granted authorization, the user will still have the authorization through the Central Coordinating Register for Legal Entities.

service_error.general_heading: You cannot give power of attorney to this service
service_error.approve_heading: You cannot approve requests for this service
service_error.undelegable_service: {{resourceOwner}} has determined that this service cannot be given to others.
service_error.technical_error: A technical error has occurred. Please try again or contact Altinn user service if the problem persists.
service_error.access_list_service: Who can use this service is determined by {{resourceOwner}}, and {{reportee}} has not been given that opportunity. We recommend contacting {{resourceOwner}}.
service_error.missing_approve_rights: You do not have the necessary authorization for all or part of this service and therefore cannot approve requests from others. If you only want to grant parts of the service, you can do so by granting authorization in the usual way.
service_error.missing_rights: You cannot give this power of attorney because you do not have access yourself.

maskinporten_page.heading: Maskinporten administration for {{name}}
maskinporten_page.suppliers_description: Organizations that have received power of attorney from {{name}}.
maskinporten_page.consumers_description: Organizations that have granted power of attorney to {{name}}.
maskinporten_page.suppliers_info_body1: Here you can give your suppliers access to APIs. The suppliers can then retrieve data on behalf of your organization. Remember that your organization must have access to an API itself before it can be passed on to others.
maskinporten_page.suppliers_info_body2: You must have the access package “Maskinporten administrator”, as well as at least one of the access packages under the area “Integrations”.
maskinporten_page.consumers_info_body: Here you can see which APIs your organization has received from others. Your organization can then retrieve data on behalf of the consumers.
maskinporten_page.supplier_not_found: We could not find the supplier
maskinporten_page.remove_supplier_body: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} as a supplier? All delegated resources will also be removed.

settings_page.no_addresses_error: The organization must have at least one email address or SMS number for notifications.
settings_page.alert_settings_info: Notifications sent to registered notification addresses are sent regardless of whether the recipient has the right to view the content in Altinn. If you have a shared email address, it is natural to include it here. Read more

a2Alerts.oldRolesContent: These Altinn roles may include services that already exist in the new Altinn solution. The services are being moved into the new access packages. The user has the same roles in the old solution, but there they include more and different services.
a2Alerts.legacyRoleContent: This role will soon be removed. Use access packages instead.

systemuser_delegation_errors.18_delegation_right_missing_delegation_a: Delegation of services failed: you do not have the rights to directly delegate services.
systemuser_delegation_errors.19_delegation_right_missing_srr_right_ac: Delegation of services failed: one or more services use access lists where the organization does not have access.
systemuser_delegation_errors.20_delegation_right_insufficient_authent: Delegation of services failed: one or more services require an explicit access level.
systemuser_delegation_errors.51_accesspackage_delegation_failed: Delegation of access packages to the system access failed.
systemuser_delegation_errors.53_accesspackage_delegation_missing_requ: You do not have sufficient access rights to delegate the requested access packages.
systemuser_delegation_errors.55_accesspackage_failed_to_get_delegated: Unable to retrieve delegated access packages.
systemuser_delegation_errors.57_systemuser_failed_to_delete_accesspac: Could not delete access package delegation for the system access.
systemuser_delegation_errors.68_delegation_right_missing_delegation_a: Delegation of services failed: you lack the necessary access packages for delegation.

poa_overview_page.heading: Powers of attorney overview for {{name}}
poa_overview_page.no_access_title: You do not have access to this page

packages_tab.description: Select an area to view the associated access packages and who has power of attorney for them.
packages_tab.info_box_p1: Access packages are a collection of forms and services that deal with the same topic. These replace the current Altinn roles, but there will not be a one-to-one relationship. To find out which access package to assign to someone, it may be helpful to consider what that person will actually be working on.
packages_tab.info_box_link: Read more about access packages on the help pages.

instances_tab.no_search_results: No matches for message or form.

instance.title_forbidden: Message or form you do not have access to
instance.request_instance_admin_package: I want to share from the inbox
instance.withdraw_instance_admin_package: Delete request for power of attorney

request_modal.heading: Do you want to request power of attorney to share from the inbox?
request_modal.description_1: To share and grant power of attorney from the inbox you must have the access package: «Access manager for single messages, forms and dialogs»
request_modal.description_2: This access package gives you the authority to grant other users access to single messages, forms and dialogs that you yourself have access to. Do you want to request this access package?
request_modal.pending_heading: You have requested the access package «Access manager for single messages, forms and dialogs»
request_modal.pending_description: Waiting for {{fromParty}} to process your request. Once approved, you will be able to see and delete your power of attorney under «Access management» in the main menu.
request_modal.request_error: Could not request the access package. Please try again.
request_modal.delete_request_error: Could not delete the request. Please try again.
request_modal.request_success: Request for power of attorney sent

instance_detail_page.document_title_from_inbox: Share and give power of attorney - Altinn
instance_detail_page.description: Here you can share a message or form from the inbox or get an overview of who already has access. Use the search field to search for people or add them as a new user.
instance_detail_page.no_access_description: You do not have the authority to share this with others. To share and grant power of attorney from the inbox, you must have the access package:
instance_detail_page.instance_admin_package_name_org: Access manager for single messages, forms and dialogs
instance_detail_page.instance_admin_edit_disclaimer: Only Access Managers or Main Administrators can edit an access grant after it has been given to a user.

poa_status.no_permissions: You have to give power of attorney

party_info.delegate_confirmation: Do you want to grant {{partyName}} power of attorney for {{packageName}}? The user will get access to all services in the package.
party_info.revoke_confirmation: Do you want to revoke {{partyName}}'s power of attorney for {{packageName}}? The user will lose access to all services in the package.

package_poa_details_page.package_delegation_success: {{name}} has been granted power of attorney for {{accessPackage}}.
package_poa_details_page.package_revocation_success: {{name}} no longer has power of attorney for {{accessPackage}}.

users_tab.description: Search for users to grant or revoke permissions.
users_tab.no_users: No users have power of attorney for this package on behalf of {{fromparty}}.

resource_list.show_expired_services_helptext: Some services are expired and will not let you submit/receive new data. You can still grant others access to them, but they will only be able to view old submissions/messages on that service.

landing_page.alert_heading: New solution for access management. Here's what you need to do!
landing_page.alert_body: The current Altinn roles have been replaced by access packages. An access package contains authorization for various forms and services within the same category.
landing_page.alert_body_p2: Access rights you have previously granted in the old Altinn must now be replaced with new authorizations.
landing_page.alert_body_p3: Select the "Users" menu item, find the desired user, and assign access packages or individual services.
landing_page.users_item_description: People and organizations that have been granted powers of attorney in {{reportee}}
landing_page.your_rights_description: The powers of attorney you hold on behalf of {{reportee}}
landing_page.your_rights_description_yourself: The powers of attorney you hold on behalf of yourself
landing_page.your_clients_description: See which clients you have access to on behalf of {{reportee}}
landing_page.users_item_description_yourself: People and organizations that have been granted powers of attorney by you
landing_page.reportees_item_description_org: All who have granted powers of attorney to {{reportee}}
landing_page.reportees_item_description_yourself: All who have granted powers of attorney to you
landing_page.poa_item_description: All access packages and individual services {{reportee}} has given powers of attorney for
landing_page.poa_item_description_yourself: All access packages and individual services you have given powers of attorney for
landing_page.maskinporten_item_description: Manage powers of attorney for APIs in Maskinporten
landing_page.client_admin_item_description: Grant powers of attorney from clients to users in {{reportee}}

request_page.heading: Requests for {{name}}
request_page.review_user_link: See the powers of attorney {{name}} has now
request_page.review_close_info: If you do not choose to approve or reject a request, it will remain as an active request.
request_page.cannot_approve_package: You lack this access package yourself and therefore cannot approve the request.

draft_request_page.heading: Do you want to request access to {{to_name}}?
draft_request_page.intro_person: A proposal for access to a service on your behalf has been created, but you must approve it for it to take effect. The request will only be sent to {{to_name}} if you agree.
draft_request_page.intro_company: A proposal for access to a service on behalf of {{from_name}} has been created, but you must approve it for it to take effect. The request will only be sent to {{to_name}} if you agree.
draft_request_page.request_approved: The request has been sent to {{to_name}}
draft_request_page.request_approved_info: Someone at {{to_name}} will soon process your request, and you will receive a notification when it is approved.
draft_request_page.request_withdrawn_info: You have rejected the request and will therefore not receive power of attorney for {{to_name}}.
draft_request_page.close_window_info: You can now close this window.
draft_request_page.missing_request_id: Cannot load request: requestId-parameter is not set in url
draft_request_page.batch_partial_error: Could not process the following resources: {{resources}}. Please try again.

add_altinn2_account_page.add_account_info: If you have previously logged in with a username and password, you can add your old account here. You will then have access to the messages sent to this account when you log in with email.
add_altinn2_account_page.login_info: Log in with username and password to connect the account with {{name}}.
add_altinn2_account_page.invalid_credentials: Invalid combination of username and password.
add_altinn2_account_page.add_account_error: An error occurred while adding the account.
add_altinn2_account_page.account_added_info: You will now see your old messages in the new inbox. You can add more accounts under Your profile if you wish.
add_altinn2_account_page.not_self_identified_error: Only email-users can add an account.
add_altinn2_account_page.feature_toggled_off: Ability to add account is disabled.
add_altinn2_account_page.forgot_password_info: Enter your username, and we will send a link to add account to the email address registered for this username.
add_altinn2_account_page.forgot_password_error: Could not send email. Check that the username is correct.
add_altinn2_account_page.no_email_for_username: We found no email for this username. Check that the username is correct.
add_altinn2_account_page.forgot_password_sent: We have sent an email to {{email}}.
add_altinn2_account_page.add_account_from_token_not_from_caller: Link does not belong to the logged-in user
